name: TAKEDA PHARM.SPON.ADR/1/2
summary: Takeda Pharmaceutical Company Limited is a global, values-based, R&D-driven biopharmaceutical leader committed to discovering and delivering life-transforming treatments, guided by our commitment to patients, our people and the planet. The company focuses on several therapeutic areas, including oncology, rare diseases, neuroscience, gastroenterology (GI) and plasma-derived therapies (PDT). Takeda is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
